---
title: "CD39 regulates P2RX7-mediated lung necrotic lesions in severe experimental tuberculosis"
date: 2026-03-01
author:
  - name: Almeida-Santos, Gislane
  - name: Santiago-Carvalho, Igor
  - name: Almeida, Fabrício Moreira
  - name: Barbosa Bomfim, Caio César
  - name: Santos E Silva, Juan Carlo
  - name: Cantarini, Deborah Giovanna
  - name: Silva, Camila Ramos
  - name: Ribeiro, Martha Simões
  - name: Do Nascimento, Rogério Silva
  - name: De Gois Macedo, Bruna
  - name: Lisboa Raeder, Paulo Henrique
  - name: Teixeira-Xavier Junior, Joaquim
  - name: Alvarez, José Maria
  - name: Hirata, Mario Hiroyuki
  - name: Coutinho-Silva, Robson
  - name: Robson, Simon C.
  - name: Amaral, Eduardo Pinheiro
  - name: Lasunskaia, Elena
  - name: D’Império Lima, Maria Regina
abstract: > 
  Resumo não disponível.
categories: [article]
citation: 
  container-title: "Mucosal Immunology"
  doi: "10.1016/j.mucimm.2026.03.007"
---

```{=html}

  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../index.html">Publicações</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">CD39 regulates P2RX7-mediated lung necrotic lesions in severe experimental tuberculosis</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
